summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of migrated HELIX website. All core features working correctly including 3D particle background, navigation, language switcher, and contact form.

design_issues.issue: Frequent re-rendering of expertise cards causing console spam
design_issues.details: Console shows '[Expertise] Rendering card' messages repeatedly, indicating potential optimization needed

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with Helix logo
Navigation menu works (Expertise, Partnership, Partners, Contact)
All sections render correctly (Hero, Expertise, Partnership, Partners, Contact, Footer)
Contact form displays with all required fields (Name, Email, Message)
Language switcher (EN/RU) works correctly with content translation
No JavaScript errors found on page
